testcase.name: deleteTask_taskNoLongerRetrievable_afterDeletion

testcase.name: getTaskById_returns200AndTask_whenFound
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T19:28:24.883+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : POST /tasks - creating task with title: Read a book 2026-05-12T19:28:24.883+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task created successfully with id: 1 2026-05-12T19:28:24.884+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : GET /tasks/1 - retrieving task by id 2026-05-12T19:28:24.884+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task found with id: 1

testcase.name: updateTask_returns404_whenNotFound
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T19:28:24.897+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : PUT /tasks/999 - updating task 2026-05-12T19:28:24.897+02:00 ERROR 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Cannot update task - not found with id: 999

testcase.name: deleteTask_returns404_whenNotFound
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T19:28:24.899+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : DELETE /tasks/999 - deleting task 2026-05-12T19:28:24.899+02:00 ERROR 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Cannot delete task - not found with id: 999

testcase.name: createTask_returns201AndCreatedTask
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T19:28:24.900+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : POST /tasks - creating task with title: Buy groceries 2026-05-12T19:28:24.900+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task created successfully with id: 1

testcase.name: completeTask_returns404_whenNotFound
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T19:28:24.902+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : PUT /tasks/999/complete - marking task as completed 2026-05-12T19:28:24.902+02:00 ERROR 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Cannot complete task - not found with id: 999

testcase.name: completeTask_returns200AndCompletedStatus
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T19:28:24.904+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : POST /tasks - creating task with title: Write report 2026-05-12T19:28:24.904+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task created successfully with id: 1 2026-05-12T19:28:24.905+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : PUT /tasks/1/complete - marking task as completed 2026-05-12T19:28:24.905+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task 1 marked as COMPLETED

testcase.name: updateTask_returns200WithUpdatedFields
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T19:28:24.906+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : POST /tasks - creating task with title: Old title 2026-05-12T19:28:24.906+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task created successfully with id: 1 2026-05-12T19:28:24.907+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : PUT /tasks/1 - updating task 2026-05-12T19:28:24.907+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task 1 updated successfully

testcase.name: createTask_assignsUniqueIds

testcase.name: getAllTasks_returnsAllTasks
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T19:28:24.912+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : POST /tasks - creating task with title: Task A 2026-05-12T19:28:24.912+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task created successfully with id: 1 2026-05-12T19:28:24.913+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : POST /tasks - creating task with title: Task B 2026-05-12T19:28:24.913+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task created successfully with id: 2 2026-05-12T19:28:24.914+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : GET /tasks - retrieving tasks, status filter: null 2026-05-12T19:28:24.914+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Returning 2 task(s)

testcase.name: getAllTasks_filterByCompleted_returnsOnlyCompletedTasks
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T19:28:24.922+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : POST /tasks - creating task with title: Task Alpha 2026-05-12T19:28:24.922+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task created successfully with id: 1 2026-05-12T19:28:24.924+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : POST /tasks - creating task with title: Task Beta 2026-05-12T19:28:24.924+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task created successfully with id: 2 2026-05-12T19:28:24.925+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : PUT /tasks/1/complete - marking task as completed 2026-05-12T19:28:24.925+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task 1 marked as COMPLETED 2026-05-12T19:28:24.926+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : GET /tasks - retrieving tasks, status filter: COMPLETED 2026-05-12T19:28:24.926+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Returning 1 task(s)

testcase.name: deleteTask_returns204_whenDeleted
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T19:28:24.928+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : POST /tasks - creating task with title: Task to delete 2026-05-12T19:28:24.928+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task created successfully with id: 1 2026-05-12T19:28:24.928+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : DELETE /tasks/1 - deleting task 2026-05-12T19:28:24.928+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task 1 deleted successfully

testcase.name: getAllTasks_filterByPending_returnsEmpty_whenAllCompleted
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T19:28:24.930+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : POST /tasks - creating task with title: Only Task 2026-05-12T19:28:24.930+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task created successfully with id: 1 2026-05-12T19:28:24.930+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : PUT /tasks/1/complete - marking task as completed 2026-05-12T19:28:24.930+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task 1 marked as COMPLETED 2026-05-12T19:28:24.931+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : GET /tasks - retrieving tasks, status filter: PENDING 2026-05-12T19:28:24.931+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Returning 0 task(s)

testcase.name: getAllTasks_returnsEmptyList_whenNoTasksExist
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T19:28:24.932+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : GET /tasks - retrieving tasks, status filter: null 2026-05-12T19:28:24.932+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Returning 0 task(s)

testcase.name: getAllTasks_filterByPending_returnsOnlyPendingTasks
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T19:28:24.934+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : POST /tasks - creating task with title: Pending Task 2026-05-12T19:28:24.935+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task created successfully with id: 1 2026-05-12T19:28:24.935+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : POST /tasks - creating task with title: Done Task 2026-05-12T19:28:24.935+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task created successfully with id: 2 2026-05-12T19:28:24.935+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : PUT /tasks/2/complete - marking task as completed 2026-05-12T19:28:24.935+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Task 2 marked as COMPLETED 2026-05-12T19:28:24.936+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : GET /tasks - retrieving tasks, status filter: PENDING 2026-05-12T19:28:24.936+02:00 INFO 80615 --- [task-manager-api] [ main] c.t.api.controller.TaskController : Returning 1 task(s)
